input persona: A college soccer coach focusing on team strategy and player development to improve overall performance.

I made a mental note to work on our pressuring and switching during practice this week, and to have a talk with our star player, Rachel, about her recent dip in form. The score was tied 1-1, but I knew we had the talent and determination to come out on top. The question was, could we execute and stay focused for the full 90 minutes?
label: instruction
